# Competitive References

## Peers Surveyed
1. Linear — calm density, muted palette, monochrome glyphs
2. Height — warmer density, generous line-height, soft-color status
3. Notion — long-form affordances, neutral chrome

## Patterns Worth Referencing
- Keyboard-first command palette (Cmd+K ubiquitous)
- Inline status pills with semantic color tokens
- Contextual side panel vs full-page modal choice

## Anti-Patterns
- Over-dense toolbars (Asana-style) feel cluttered at 13" viewport
